phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Goya galleries are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las salas de Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs SAH-lahs deh GOH-yah?

likely_response.local: Suba por la escalera imperial, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah eem-peh-ree-AHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: First floor, following the green signs.

responses.english: First floor, following the green signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah eem-peh-ree-AHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Suba por la escalera imperial, a la derecha.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo dejar el equipaje grande?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh deh-HAHR el eh-kee-PAH-heh GRAHN-deh?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the cloakroom, next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the cloakroom, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me dice dónde está la tienda?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿meh DEE-seh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah TYEN-dah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la recepción, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, near the exit.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Junto a la recepción, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is free entry today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay entrada gratuita hoy en día?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHY ehnt-RAH-dah grah-too-EE-tah OHY EHN DÍ-ah

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the price board.

responses.english: It is indicated on the price board.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition hall is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me dice dónde está la sala de exposiciones temporales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, meh DEE-seh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah SAH-lah deh eks-poh-zee-SYOH-nehs tehm-poh-RAH-les?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
